description_long: This is a burly adult male figure dressed in a stylized Viking warrior outfit, featuring exaggerated armor and accessories. He has a large, bushy beard and wears a horned helmet with prominent spikes, giving him a fierce and imposing appearance. His upper body is protected by oversized, spiked metal pauldrons and a fur-lined tunic, while his lower body is clad in simple trousers and sturdy boots. In one hand, he wields a large stone hammer, and in the other, a round wooden shield, both of which are detailed with wear and battle marks. The character's facial features are exaggerated, with a pronounced nose and determined expression, enhancing his cartoonish yet intimidating look. The overall design combines elements of fantasy and historical Viking attire, making him stand out as a warrior in any urban or fantasy setting.
description: A burly, bearded Viking warrior with horned helmet, spiked armor, and wielding a stone hammer and shield. His exaggerated features and detailed attire evoke a fierce, cartoonish presence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Viking's expressive face, bushy beard, horned helmet, and both weapons clearly visible.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the spiked metal pauldrons, fur tunic, and the back of the helmet with visible horns.
description_view_2: Back-side view focusing on the double-bladed axe, the layered armor, and the character's broad stance.
description_view_3: Angled front view emphasizing the determined facial expression, large hammer, and the overall dynamic posture.
attribute_clothing_type: Viking warrior attire with horned helmet, spiked metal pauldrons, fur-lined tunic, and simple trousers
attribute_hairstyle: long, thick beard with short hair under helmet
